overall.description: A first-person traversal through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning under a neon-lit overpass and descending through increasingly narrow urban corridors into a dark, red-lit industrial alleyway. The footage showcases the game's atmospheric lighting and wet reflective surfaces throughout the journey from open streets to enclosed passages.

exiting the covered overpass area into a more open street corner

large vertical digital billboard displaying 'VALENTINO' advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive concrete overpass bathed in pink neon light, with the camera moving swiftly along wet asphalt. A prominent Valentino billboard stands on the right as the camera navigates a gentle curve, transitioning from the sheltered underpass toward an open street corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with food vendors and pedestrians

events.description: turning corner to reveal street level with food stalls and pedestrians
passing pedestrians walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: rounding the corner and proceeding along the sidewalk past food vendors and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction
person standing near the burrito food stall

entered.detail: colorful food stall with 'BURRITO' signage and illuminated menu
high-rise residential tower with multiple balconies
white and red striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk
tall illuminated clock tower on the street corner

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a city sidewalk, passing a burrito food stall and construction barriers. Pedestrians walk along the path as the camera moves past a tall clock structure, with a high-rise concrete building dominating the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending walkway between buildings with large advertisements

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between buildings with descending stairs
environment becomes dominated by red neon lighting as depth increases

agents.ego_description: moving down concrete stairs and ramps into a lower-level alleyway between buildings

entered.detail: massive screen displaying 'The Big Show' advertisement with food imagery
wide concrete staircase descending between building structures
large metal piping and ductwork running overhead between buildings
intense red neon strip lighting along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into a narrow walkway between buildings, passing large digital billboards and concrete stairs. Industrial pipes run overhead as the environment transitions from mixed lighting to an increasingly red-lit, enclosed space with steam effects becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial service corridor with heavy red neon lighting

events.description: passing through area with steam vents and atmospheric fog effects

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow red-lit corridor with industrial piping overhead

entered.detail: steam and vapor rising from vents in the alley floor creating atmosphere
metal grating walkways and platforms suspended between building walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a deeply enclosed industrial alley bathed in intense red neon light. Steam rises from floor vents as the camera passes beneath metal catwalks and heavy piping, creating a claustrophobic cyberpunk atmosphere with wet reflective surfaces throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a neon-lit urban overpass into a claustrophobic, red-drenched industrial alleyway. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass bathed in pink neon, gliding along wet asphalt past a Valentino billboard as the camera curves toward an open street corner. The scene then shifts onto a city sidewalk, passing a burrito stall and pedestrians beside a tall clock structure and a dominating high-rise building. As the camera descends into a narrow walkway, the open city atmosphere gives way to an enclosed space filled with digital billboards, concrete stairs, and overhead industrial pipes. Finally, the environment narrows further into a deeply enclosed alley where the lighting turns an intense red and steam rises from floor vents beneath heavy metal catwalks.
